banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: A 24-year-old full car-licence holder applying for a provisional Category C (large lorry) entitlement, holding a current photocard licence.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: fullCarLicenceHeld is true, so the flow proceeds through applicant_and_category to medical_and_licence_format without exiting.

safetyNotice: This packet is a mock conformance fixture (GSP-0016). GovSchema never submits applications; a human must review and submit through the official DVLA channel.
